title: senecio hintonii
intro: Senecio hintonii, also known as Hinton's ragwort, is a plant species native to Mexico and parts of Central America, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Senecio hintonii are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, soothe respiratory issues, and even exhibit antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
